ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "plant_code" TEXT /* Unique code or identifier for the plant */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the plant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "plant_status" TEXT /* Status of the plant (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the plant */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model or type of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or calibration */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was collected */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model or type of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the reading was taken */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid, flagged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, operator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert (if applicable) */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being monitored */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering an alert */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email address to send notifications to */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert condition */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration (in minutes) the condition must persist before triggering an alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_configs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, sent) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email address or list of email addresses to which the report was sent */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report configuration */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of report generation (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_email" TEXT /* Email address to send reports to */,
  "report_template" TEXT /* Template used for generating the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_duration" INTEGER /* Duration (in minutes) for which the report should be generated (e.g., 1440 for daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value for the sensor */,
  "calibration_time" TEXT /* Time the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* User who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., sensor, user, system) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details or context for the log entry */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., new, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
